nodes.label: GET /api/dashboard/overview
nodes.summary: Returns combined overview payload with 5 TopN sets (lowContribModels, lowContribChannels, highValueModels, segmentTopMargins, growthPotentials)

nodes.label: GET /api/dashboard/profit-anomaly
nodes.summary: Daily profit anomaly series with optional from/to date range

nodes.label: GET /api/dashboard/metric/codes
nodes.summary: List of available metric_code values for metric trend selector

nodes.label: GET /api/dashboard/metric/trend
nodes.summary: Daily trend for a single metric with MoM/YoY ratios

nodes.label: GET /api/dashboard/profit-decomp
nodes.summary: Profit decline 4-factor attribution (returns mom and yoy arrays) for one ym

nodes.label: GET /api/dashboard/profit-decomp/months
nodes.summary: Most recent 24 yyyy-MM months available for decomposition

nodes.label: GET /api/dashboard/segment/top-margin
nodes.summary: Segments (brand x city x age x member) with highest gross margin TopN

nodes.label: GET /api/alert/stream
nodes.summary: SSE endpoint pushing realtime alert events to Vue alert bar

nodes.label: app/RUN.md
nodes.summary: Spring Boot run guide and complete REST API index (19 endpoints)

nodes.label: ads_column_dict
nodes.summary: MySQL/Hive ads table holding english->chinese column name mappings consumed by /api/dict

nodes.label: EventSimulator
nodes.summary: Spring scheduled task that publishes simulated phone sales to Kafka phone_raw

nodes.label: AlertConsumer
nodes.summary: Kafka @KafkaListener that consumes phone_alert topic and forwards to AlertService

nodes.label: AlertService
nodes.summary: Service holding SSE emitters and Redis-backed recent alert history
